welcomeMessages: What would you like to talk about?
What can I do for you?
chat.startHint: Type a message below to begin
chat.modelSwitched: Model will switch to {{model}} on next send
chat.pendingModelRestartHint: {{model}} is queued for the next send. Applying it will restart the OpenClaw gateway, and ClawBox may briefly show the gateway as unavailable.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.startConversation: Start a conversation to create a session
sessions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure your OpenClaw gateway connection and upstream model providers
settings.modelEmptyHint: No models available yet. Check your gateway connection or save the provider configuration first.
settings.providerConfigDesc: Choose an upstream model provider and configure its model endpoint. CommonStack stays in the recommended position, while Custom Provider supports OpenAI-compatible or Anthropic-compatible endpoints.
settings.providerCommonstackHint: Use a CommonStack node and API key for the recommended project experience.
settings.providerCustomHint: Connect to OpenAI-compatible or Anthropic-compatible API endpoints. Enter a custom Base URL, compatibility, and API key below.
settings.providerModelRefreshHint: After switching providers, save the configuration and wait for the gateway to reload before choosing a default model for that provider.
settings.providerCommonstackApiKeyError: CommonStack API keys must start with "ak-"
settings.providerNoModels: No models were returned from this provider
settings.providerEndpointUnavailable: Unable to reach the provider endpoint ({{baseUrl}}). Check the Base URL, compatibility mode, API key, and local network or TLS settings.
settings.gatewayRestartHint: This change will restart the OpenClaw gateway. ClawBox may briefly show the gateway as unavailable, which is expected.
settings.gatewayRestartingBody: ClawBox may briefly show the gateway as unavailable and will recover automatically once the gateway comes back.
settings.gatewayRestartDelayedTitle: Still waiting for the OpenClaw gateway
settings.gatewayRestartDelayedBody: ClawBox may be unable to load models or plugin status until the gateway recovers. Please try again shortly.
settings.titleModelDesc: Conversation titles and tool summaries automatically follow OpenClaw's current default model.
settings.titleModelHint: Change the default model above to affect both features.
settings.envWarning: Environment is usable, but has warnings
settings.envSystemNodeWarning: System Node.js is currently {{detected}}. {{expected}} is recommended. You can continue using the connected gateway, but upgrading Node.js is still recommended before rebuilding or restarting the environment.
settings.reconfigureDesc: Reconfigure the OpenClaw environment? This will take you back to the setup wizard.
settings.reconfigureTransitionDesc: Switching to the OpenClaw environment flow...

startup.waitingGateway: Waiting for OpenClaw to finish starting...
startup.errorHint: Check that both ClawBox and OpenClaw started correctly, then reopen the app.

errors.serverTimeout: Timed out while connecting to the ClawBox backend.
errors.gatewayTimeout: Timed out while waiting for OpenClaw to start.

cron.title: Cron Jobs
cron.agentMessagePlaceholder: Message to send to the agent
cron.deliveryChannelHint: Select a connected channel to receive results

soul.title: Soul Market
soul.description: Define your AI assistant's personality and style
soul.noSoulHint: Pick a template below or create your own
soul.editorPlaceholder:
Write your SOUL.md content here...

Define your AI assistant's personality, style, and behavior.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Manage bundled, installed, and workspace skills

market.emptyState: Search for a keyword to find and install skills from ClawHub.
market.loginRequired: Please log in to ClawHub before searching or installing skills.
market.noResults: No ClawHub skills matched your search
market.installHint: Search results will be installed into the current OpenClaw workspace
market.cliMissing: ClawHub CLI will be prepared automatically on first install
market.cliUnavailable: Node.js runtime is not ready yet, so ClawHub installs are unavailable
market.noSummary: This skill does not have a summary yet.

auth.title: ClawHub Login
auth.description: Complete browser login first, then search and install ClawHub skills.
auth.browserHint: Click below to trigger `clawhub login` and finish authorization in your browser.
auth.tokenHint: If browser login is unavailable, you can still paste a token manually. After login, future searches will automatically send authenticated requests.

errors.invalidToken: This ClawHub token is invalid or expired. Try a different token.
errors.notLoggedIn: ClawHub is not logged in yet.
errors.network: Unable to verify the ClawHub login status right now. Please try again later.

errors.rateLimited: ClawHub search is being rate limited. Please try again shortly.
errors.rateLimitedRetry: ClawHub search is being rate limited. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
errors.requiresForce: ClawHub marked this skill as suspicious. If you trust the source, you can continue with Force Install.

market.forceConfirm: ClawHub has marked {{slug}} as suspicious. Force install anyway?

messages.installed: Installed {{slug}}. Start a new OpenClaw session to load it.

manual.title: Manual Skill Import
manual.description: Copy a skill from a local directory, local archive, or remote address into the current OpenClaw workspace.

hints.directory: Point directly to a skill directory, or to a repository directory that contains exactly one skill.
hints.archive: Supports `.zip`, `.skill`, `.tar.gz`, and `.tgz`. The archive will be extracted and scanned for a skill directory.
hints.url: Supports GitHub repository URLs and direct http(s) archive links.

messages.imported: Imported {{skillName}}. Start a new OpenClaw session to load it.

errors.workspaceNotConfigured: No workspace directory is available yet, so the skill cannot be imported right now.
errors.sourceNotFound: The local path could not be found. Please check the path and try again.
errors.invalidPath: The local path is invalid or does not match the selected import type.
errors.unsupportedArchive: This archive format is not supported yet. Please use .zip, .skill, .tar.gz, or .tgz.
errors.invalidUrl: The remote address is invalid. Only GitHub repository URLs and direct archive links are supported right now.
errors.downloadFailed: Failed to download the remote skill source. Please try again later or use a local import.
errors.missingSkill: No importable SKILL.md was found in the source. Point directly to the skill directory or repository.
errors.ambiguousSkill: Multiple skills were found in the source. Point directly to the specific one you want to import.
errors.skillExists: A skill with the same name already exists in the workspace, and overwrite was not enabled for this import.

channels.notConnected: Gateway not connected. Configure gateway in Settings first.
channels.empty: No channels match the current filter
channels.searchHint: Find a channel by name, platform, or alias.
channels.filterHint: Switch between running channels and channels that are ready to be connected.
channels.accountsHint: Manage account-specific overrides and choose which account should be used by default.
channels.accountsOptionalHint: Multi-account mode is optional. Add another account only if you really need separate credentials or routing.
channels.accountsOptionalEmpty: This channel is currently using the top-level default configuration. Add another account to manage account-specific overrides.
channels.accountQuickStartHint: Only show the key fields needed to get this account working.
channels.accountAdvancedHint: Full account-level overrides for advanced cases.
channels.accountSchemaUnavailable: This channel does not expose an account-level configuration schema yet.
channels.schemaPending: ClawBox dynamic configuration for this channel will be connected in the next phase.
channels.schemaUnavailable: This channel does not expose a usable configuration schema yet.
channels.rawConfigFallback: This channel does not expose a structured schema yet. You can still edit its raw configuration below.
channels.notLoadedHint: This channel exists in the ClawBox catalog but is not loaded in the current OpenClaw runtime yet. You can still fill in configuration first.
channels.configSaved: Configuration saved! The gateway will auto-apply changes.
channels.logoutConfirm: This will clear the stored credentials. Continue?
channels.activateHint: Use this after saving configuration to restart the gateway and check whether the channel can enter the runtime.
channels.startHint: Gateway will restart to apply changes
channels.probeNoAccount: Gateway returned no account info for this channel. Check if the gateway is running.
channels.probeNotConfigured: Channel credentials not fully configured. Save credentials first.
channels.probeNotEnabled: Channel is disabled. Enable it to run the probe.
channels.probeSkipped: Gateway skipped the probe. Check channel configuration.

legend.running: Already in the current runtime and ready for message handling.
legend.pending: Configured or activating, but not fully ready yet.
legend.available: Known by ClawBox and ready to be connected.

channels.advancedHint: Optional settings for power users. You usually do not need these during first-time setup.

quickStart.default: Fill in the essential credentials first, then connect the channel.
quickStart.telegram: Paste the Bot Token from @BotFather, then click Save and Connect.
quickStart.slack: Fill in the bot credentials you actually use, then click Save and Connect.
quickStart.feishu: Enter App ID and App Secret first, then Save and Connect.
quickStart.discord: Enter the bot token, save it, then connect Discord.
quickStart.irc: Fill in the IRC server and nick first, then Save and Connect.
quickStart.googlechat: Fill in the minimum Google Chat webhook settings, then Save and Connect.
quickStart.signal: Fill in the local Signal bridge settings first, then Save and Connect.
quickStart.imessage: Configure the local bridge path first, then Save and Connect.
quickStart.whatsapp: Start the QR login flow, scan the code, then return here to continue.
quickStart.zalouser: Start the QR login flow, scan the code in Zalo, then continue.

channels.quickStartUnavailable: No quick-start fields are available for this channel yet. Use the advanced section below.

telegram.description: Connect a Telegram bot through the Bot API.

whatsapp.description: Link your WhatsApp account through a QR login flow.

discord.description: Run OpenClaw inside a Discord bot integration.

irc.description: Classic IRC connection with server, nick and channel routing.

googlechat.description: Google Workspace Chat app integration over the Chat API.

slack.description: Slack workspace integration through Socket Mode or HTTP events.

signal.description: Signal messaging integration backed by signal-cli.

imessage.description: Local iMessage bridge powered by imsg.

feishu.description: Enterprise messaging integration for Feishu and Lark workspaces.

nostr.description: Encrypted DM integration for the Nostr ecosystem.

msteams.description: Bot Framework integration for Microsoft Teams.

mattermost.description: Mattermost plugin-style integration for self-hosted teams.

nextcloud-talk.description: Self-hosted messaging integration through Nextcloud Talk.

matrix.description: Open protocol chat integration for Matrix rooms and DMs.

bluebubbles.description: macOS BlueBubbles bridge for iMessage-compatible workflows.

line.description: LINE Messaging API integration for bot-based delivery.

zalo.description: Zalo Bot API integration for Vietnam-focused messaging.

zalouser.description: Personal-account Zalo integration through QR login.

synology-chat.description: Webhook-based integration for Synology Chat deployments.

pairing.hint: When DM policy is "Pairing", new users must send a message to get a code, then admin approves here
